mapper.select: select id, title, system_prompt, last_message, last_chat_time, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from aifc_ai_session where id = #{id} and create_by = #{createBy} and status = 1

select id, title, system_prompt, last_message, last_chat_time, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from aifc_ai_session where create_by = #{createBy} and status = 1 order by ifnull(last_chat_time, create_time) desc, id desc
mapper.update: update aifc_ai_session set status = 0, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where create_by = #{createBy} and status = 1
